levers.name: No Action Required
levers.subtitle: DM Pipeline Supporting Q2
levers.rationale: Q2 outlook (357,000) is above the Q2 OKR (351,000). Prior direct mail campaigns are driving enrollment pipeline into Q2. Email reactivation would defer Q2 enrollments to Q3 — the wrong direction.
levers.estimated_impact: Q2 outlook is tracking +6,000 vs OKR. No lever action needed; monitor quarterly pacing.
levers.action: Hold all channel volumes as planned. Reassess if Q2 outlook drops below OKR.
execution_steps: No lever action required this week.
Continue monitoring quarterly pacing against OKR.
Reassess if gap widens further below OKR.
Publish updated playbook to the CS/EM channel.

levers.name: Email Reactivation
levers.subtitle: Defer 70% of email volume (4,046) to Q3
levers.rationale: Use when Q2 outlook falls below OKR with 7+ weeks remaining. Email reactivation is eligible under marketing/reactivation criteria and has a short 7-day workback.
levers.estimated_impact: Defer 70% of email volume from the next eligible window. Estimated movement: -4,046 Q2 enrollments to Q3.
levers.action: Defer reactivation volume and update campaign calendar.
execution_steps: Confirm decision by the next working day.
Coordinate with GROMO, CS, and EM to update campaign schedules.
Apply eligibility filters and freeze affected audience segments.
Publish updated playbook to the CS/EM channel.

levers.name: Mailer Flat Deferment
levers.subtitle: Defer 100% of DM volume (8,122) to Q3
levers.rationale: Q2 outlook is above OKR with 7 weeks remaining. Use standard mail deferment to shift volume into next quarter.
levers.estimated_impact: Defer 100% of qualifying mail volume into next quarter.
levers.action: Pause outbound mailer shipments and update the mail calendar.
execution_steps: Confirm decision by the next working day.
Coordinate with GROMO, CS, and EM to update campaign schedules.
Apply eligibility filters and freeze affected audience segments.
Publish updated playbook to the CS/EM channel.

levers.name: Throttle Pause
levers.subtitle: Unthrottle next available send window
levers.rationale: Q2 outlook is below OKR with only 7 weeks remaining. Throttle pause can free up volume with a short workback.
levers.estimated_impact: Unthrottle planned communications for the next available window.
levers.action: Pause planned sends and align with media calendar.
execution_steps: Confirm decision by the next working day.
Coordinate with GROMO, CS, and EM to update campaign schedules.
Apply eligibility filters and freeze affected audience segments.
Publish updated playbook to the CS/EM channel.
